goal: Audit firmware IMU mounting assumptions and accel validity semantics under a vertically mounted MPU6050 on a horizontal mainboard.
deliverable: Evidence-backed firmware audit with minimal code change only if root cause is proven.
constraints: Do not guess axis remaps without evidence
Do not change host protocol format
Do not claim verification in the mounted workspace
acceptance_criteria: Differentiate raw body-frame acceleration from de-gravitated linear acceleration
Differentiate heading usability from acceleration usability
Restrict firmware edits to deterministic IMU issues only
inferred_assumptions: The host currently receives raw body-frame acceleration via firmware status
Existing vertical-axis-to-sensor-X mapping is not disproven by current evidence
